## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

What problem does this solve? Link to related issues.

## How

Key implementation details or approach.

## Checklist

- [ ] Code builds (`pnpm build`)
- [ ] Type checks pass (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if public API changed)
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventions (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
